title: AgentCertResult
description: One normalized engine result inside an AgentCert evidence bundle. Required fields describe provenance, lifecycle phase, verdict, artifacts, and evidence.

schemaVersion.description: Compatibility family for normalized AgentCert product results.

product.description: Engine that produced the result, for example mcpbench or tripwire-ci.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase covered by this result.

artifacts.description: Named local or hosted artifact paths that support this result.
